features: Cleans and cares for all the family
Skin feeling soft, smooth and conditioned
Bath foam wash is mild enough for all skin types
description: Product Description Developed and designed with a kind formulation, this bath soaks, cleans and protects the whole family. Carex Sensitive Bath Soak has been designed and developed by experts with a kind eyes formulation. This works in harmony with young to mature skin to keep it looking its best. The product uses a unique skin support system that cleans, cares and protects all the family, so your skin feels soft and nourished too. Carex Sensitive Bath Soak cleans, cares and protects the skin helping to leave it feeling soft, smooth and conditioned. A delicate fragrance leaves you smelling fresh and clean. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Lactic Acid, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Sodium Benzoate, Benzotriazolyl Dodecyl p-Cresol, Propylene Glycol, CI 60730 Directions Apply a small amount of body wash to a wet sponge or hands. Lather and massage onto the body. Rinse thoroughly with water. Box Contains 6 x Carex Sensitive Bath Foamwash 500 ml See more
